recentEvaluations.rationale: It discusses what consumes weekly usage in the background, not a limit reset or restored availability.
recentEvaluations.tweetText:
Three things that can consume usage in the background  

- automations 
- memory 
- suggested prompts  

and for memory and suggested prompts they use a small percentage, around 1% of the weekly limit each under normal conditions. You can disable all three in the settings if you wish.
